headline: IDEX Corporation Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: NORTHBROOK, Ill., May 06, 2026--IDEX Corp. (NYSE:IEX) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share, its 126th consecutive regular quarterly payment.

headline: Idex Corporation Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend, Payable on June 5, 2026
summary: IDEX CORPORATION announced that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share. This dividend will be paid June 5, 2026 to shareholders of record as of...
